# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  vmName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myWebAppVM
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    defaultValue: azureuser
  adminPasswordOrKey:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: 'YourStrongP@ssw0rd'
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: [system.defaultLocation]
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_DS1_v2

resources:
- name: myWebAppVM
  type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  apiVersion: '2020-12-01'
  location: [parameters('location')]
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: [parameters('vmSize')]
    osProfile:
      computerName: [parameters('vmName')]
      adminUsername: [parameters('adminUsername')]
      adminPassword: [parameters('adminPasswordOrKey')]
    storageProfile:
      imageReference:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: 2019-Datacenter
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        name: myOSDisk
        caching: ReadWrite
        createOption: FromImage
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
      dataDisks:
      - lun: 0
        diskSizeGB: 128
        createOption: Empty
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
      - id: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'myWebAppVMNic')]
        primary: true

- name: myWebAppVMNic
  type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: '2020-11-01'
  location: [parameters('location')]
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
    - name: ipconfig1
      properties:
        privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
        subnet:
          id: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', 'myVNet', 'default')]

- name: myVNet
  type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: '2020-11-01'
  location: [parameters('location')]
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
      - 10.0.0.0/16
    subnets:
    - name: default
      properties:
        addressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24

outputs:
  vmName:
    type: string
    value: [parameters('vmName')]
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    value: [parameters('adminUsername')]
